{{Quote|If I were you, I'd use the thorium instead of the baradium-the blast will be just as big, but the fire will burn longer.|Zurric Que'still|<ref name="Seregar Turnabout">{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}}</ref>}}
'''Zurric Que'stiil''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] explosives expert who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was tall and pale with dark eyes. He preferred clothes of white and dark blue. He enjoyed using his skills to get revenge against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

Zurric was an industrial [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] on a remote deep space facility and cared little for galactic politics. His life changed when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] seized the facility and killed his wife. He escaped and joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].

He once visited [[Cather Taan's Gun Shop]] in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]] to stock up on [[Detonite/Legends|detonite]] before a mission.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
